text.title: Margin Defense — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a weekly `MarginBleedReport` and the alert events it may trigger.

list.item: `bleeds` — array of `{pattern_id, severity_pct_of_margin, evidence: array, hours_or_dollars, first_detected_at}`
`alerts_triggered` — array of alert events (may be empty)
`pattern_id` — enum {silent_scope_creep, free_analysis, missing_change_request, ai_rework_loop, gold_plating, sympathy_discount}

antipattern.reason: Inconsistent — either bleed has cost (calculate %) or not (don't report).

antipattern.description: Recommended action "increase rate next quarter" for an active project bleed.
antipattern.reason: Recommended action must be project-scoped (CR, scope reset, pause). Rate decisions belong in `solo-rate-floor-calculator`.

antipattern.description: Pattern `ai_rework_loop` flagged without ≥ 3 billed iterations of the same task.
antipattern.reason: Single rework is normal; loop pattern needs ≥ 3 to differentiate from iteration.

antipattern.description: Report emitted but `comms_drafted: false` AND any bleed > 5%.
antipattern.reason: Violates r3 implementation; alert without draft is reporting theatre.

list.item: Roll up multiple instances of the same pattern within a week (e.g. 4 free analysis calls → one entry with frequency: 4).
Anonymise client name when sharing report with team.
Convert bleed to dollars OR percentage depending on stakeholder.
6-pattern coverage: array can be empty per pattern but the model evaluated all 6.
Severity math: sum of bleed % matches cumulative.
